title: Immersive Product Detail Page
prompt: Build a cozy product pages layout that features a hero-focused structure with lavender with soft yellow styling. Immersive Product Detail Page should include modal slide-in, responsive breakpoints at mobile and tablet sizes, and accessibility-compliant contrast ratios. Focus on intuitive navigation, clear product hierarchy, and conversion-optimized elements that guide users toward purchase decisions. Include a prominent search bar, category navigation, and trust-building components such as reviews, secure payment badges, and shipping information. The design should feel cohesive, modern, and aligned with contemporary e-commerce best practices while maintaining fast load times and smooth interactions.
negative_prompt: Avoid cluttered layouts, excessive pop-ups, dark pattern UX, misleading buttons, low contrast text, non-responsive design, broken mobile navigation, missing alt text, autoplay audio, intrusive interstitials.
acceptance_criteria: Payment integration displays secure badge and processes transactions
Wishlist functionality persists across sessions for logged-in users
Review system allows submission, display, and helpfulness voting
Promotional banners support scheduling and dismissible behavior
Footer contains working links to policy pages and contact information

website_card.headline: Immersive Product Detail Page
website_card.summary: A cozy e-commerce solution featuring hero-focused design with lavender with soft yellow styling, optimized for intermediate-level implementation.

title: High-Converting Product Showcase
prompt: Craft an product pages experience using a multi-panel approach with soft pastels with charcoal text accents and monochrome aesthetics. The high-converting product showcase must incorporate shimmer loading effects, mobile-first responsive design, and keyboard-navigable controls. Build in product discovery features like faceted filtering, quick view modals, and related product suggestions. Prioritize performance with lazy-loaded images, skeleton screens, and optimized assets. Ensure the interface supports guest checkout flows, account creation prompts, and social proof elements that increase buyer confidence throughout the shopping journey.
negative_prompt: No placeholder content, fake reviews, manipulative scarcity timers, hidden fees, forced account creation, non-semantic HTML, inaccessible color choices, unoptimized images, or missing form validation.
acceptance_criteria: Image gallery supports zoom, swipe, and thumbnail navigation
Breadcrumb navigation accurately reflects current page hierarchy
Newsletter signup validates email and shows success confirmation

website_card.headline: High-Converting Product Showcase
website_card.summary: Complete product pages template with shimmer loading effects, responsive layout, and conversion-focused UX patterns.

title: Interactive Product Viewer Layout
prompt: Design the Interactive Product Viewer Layout featuring soft design language, ocean blue with sand neutrals palette, and a sidebar-cart arrangement. Integrate subtle fade transitions alongside real-time inventory indicators, wishlist functionality, and a persistent mini-cart. The layout should adapt seamlessly across all device sizes with touch-friendly tap targets and swipe gestures on mobile. Include dynamic content sections, personalized recommendations, and seasonal promotional areas that can be updated without code changes. Maintain WCAG accessibility standards and ensure all interactive elements have visible focus states.
negative_prompt: Do not use deprecated HTML tags, inline CSS styles, non-responsive tables, hardcoded dimensions, unescaped user input, synchronous third-party scripts, or render-blocking resources above the fold.
acceptance_criteria: Payment integration displays secure badge and processes transactions
Wishlist functionality persists across sessions for logged-in users
Review system allows submission, display, and helpfulness voting

website_card.headline: Interactive Product Viewer Layout
website_card.summary: Production-ready interactive product viewer layout with accessibility compliance, mobile-first approach, and modern animation integration.

title: Dynamic Product Story Page
prompt: Implement a responsive dynamic product story page that leverages magazine principles with monochrome black and white color scheme and botanical visual treatment. The interface should showcase staggered entrance animations, implement sticky navigation on scroll, and feature a collapsible mobile menu. Add advanced e-commerce functionality including product comparison tools, size selectors with visual guides, and one-click reordering for returning customers. The design must support multiple currencies, language switching, and region-specific content while preserving consistent branding and user experience across all markets.
negative_prompt: Prevent layout shift, flash of unstyled content, missing error states, dead-end pages, unclear CTAs, overwhelming advertisements, auto-subscribing newsletters, or confusing checkout flows.
acceptance_criteria: Responsive layout works on mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports
Product cards display correct pricing, images, and availability status
Cart updates reflect quantity changes without full page reload
Navigation remains accessible via keyboard and screen readers
Page load time remains under 3 seconds for primary content

website_card.headline: Dynamic Product Story Page
website_card.summary: Professional-grade e-commerce component set with botanical aesthetics and comprehensive feature coverage.

title: Scroll-Driven Product Experience
prompt: Generate a conversion-oriented product pages design with a overlapping framework, crimson with pearl white tones, and monochrome styling approach. Embed drag and drop feedback throughout the user journey, from homepage entry through product browsing to cart confirmation. Include intelligent search with autocomplete, filter chips for refining results, and a streamlined checkout process that minimizes form fields. Add urgency triggers like stock counters and sale timers alongside trust signals such as customer testimonials, return policy highlights, and security certification badges. Ensure cross-browser compatibility and optimize for Core Web Vitals with efficient rendering and minimal layout shift.
negative_prompt: Skip verbose animations, heavy image assets, non-lazy loading, missing loading states, generic stock photography, inconsistent spacing, or typography that fails below 16px on mobile viewports.
acceptance_criteria: Payment integration displays secure badge and processes transactions
Wishlist functionality persists across sessions for logged-in users
Review system allows submission, display, and helpfulness voting

website_card.headline: Scroll-Driven Product Experience

Add urgency triggers like stock counters and sale timers alongside trust signals such as customer testimonials, return policy highlights, and security certification badges. acceptance_criteria: Image gallery supports zoom, swipe, and thumbnail navigation
Breadcrumb navigation accurately reflects current page hierarchy
Newsletter signup validates email and shows success confirmation

website_card.headline: Product Page with Price
website_card.summary: Professional-grade e-commerce component set with monochrome aesthetics and comprehensive feature coverage.

title: Limited Edition Product Showcase

Integrate pulse animations alongside real-time inventory indicators, wishlist functionality, and a persistent mini-cart. title: Tech Shop with Troubleshooter

The experience should feature smooth page transitions, responsive image carousels, and breadcrumb navigation for orientation. Cart updates reflect quantity changes without full page reload
Navigation remains accessible via keyboard and screen readers
Page load time remains under 3 seconds for primary content
